PTRA_MEDICAID PTSD Indicator - Medicaid Only Data NUM 1 This code specifies whether the enrollee met the chronic condition algorithm criteria, considering only Medicaid data, for having PTSD Values:
0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
